race.name: Tartu Maraton
race.tagline: Estonia's winter marathon — 63 kilometers across the frozen Baltic lowlands, where one of Europe's oldest ski races meets the flattest course in the Worldloppet.

vitals.aid_stations: Multiple stations with warm drinks and energy food

climate.description: February in southern Estonia delivers cold continental conditions moderated by Baltic proximity. Temperatures typically -15°C to -3°C. Snow reliability has become increasingly variable — the low altitude and Baltic influence mean warm winters can threaten conditions.
challenges: Low altitude (100m) makes snow reliability increasingly precarious
Baltic weather systems can bring sudden thaws
Flat terrain means constant wind exposure across open fields
Variable snow quality — from hard-packed ice to wet slush

course.primary: Point-to-point from Otepää to Elva through the rolling hills and forests of southern Estonia. Despite the low altitude, the terrain has gentle undulation through mixed forest and open farmland. Otepää is known as the 'winter capital' of Estonia.
course.surface: Machine-groomed classic tracks through forest and open farmland
features: Starts in Otepää — Estonia's 'winter capital' and FIS World Cup venue
One of the flattest courses in the Worldloppet series
Passes through classic Estonian countryside — forest, lakes, and farmland
One of the oldest continuously run ski marathons (founded 1960)

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Deep history (1960) and Worldloppet membership provide strong foundations. Low altitude, flat terrain, and declining snow reliability are the main limitations. A straightforward, honest ski marathon with Baltic charm.
nordic_lab_rating.tier_note: Prestige 4 promotes from base TIER 2 — stays TIER 2 (cannot enter TIER 1)

history.summary: Founded in 1960, the Tartu Maraton is one of the oldest ski marathons in Europe and Estonia's most important winter sporting event. The race connects Otepää — a town with deep ties to Estonian skiing and identity — to Elva through southern Estonian countryside. Despite the country's low altitude and flat terrain, Estonia has a proud nordic skiing tradition, and the Tartu Maraton is its centerpiece. The race is a Worldloppet member.
notable_facts: Founded in 1960 — one of the oldest ski marathons in Europe
Otepää is Estonia's 'winter capital' and has hosted FIS World Cup events
Estonia's most important winter mass-participation sporting event
The Estonian flag was first consecrated in Otepää in 1884 — the town has deep national significance
One of the lowest-altitude courses in the Worldloppet series

videos.title: 2018 Tartu ski marathon 63km
videos.description:
TARTU MARATON  / 63 km track

TARTU MARATON IS ONE OF THE OLDEST SKI MARATHONS IN THE WORLD WITH ITS HISTORY OF ALMOST 60 YEARS. 
IT IS ALSO ONE OF THE BIGGEST SKI MARATHONS IN THE WORLD.
THE TRADITIONAL 63 KM MARATHON GOES FROM OTEPÄÄ TO ELVA

We did it in 4h52min

videos.title: 49. Tartu Maraton (2023) - first 2km - leia ennast, find yourself
videos.description:
ENGLISH:
This video shows 49th Tartu Maraton (Feb 19, 2023) skiiers just before the 2 km point on a downhill slope. This cross country skiing marathon is held in Southern Estonia (between Otepää and Elva) is in classical technique and belongs to the Worldloppet and Estoloppet series. You can try to find yourself among the skiiers in this video. The 2 km point shown in the video is the point where majority of the falls happen. This year the frash snow made the skiing track slower and softer so luckily nothing major happened on this fast section of the marathon track. This year's winners of Tartu maraton were Henri Roos and Justyna Kowalczyk. Andrus Veerpalu was 4th.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
*** If you like this video I invite you to SUBSCRIBE to my channel and leave a LIKE!
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ESTONIAN: See video näitab 49. Tartu Maratoni (19. veebruar, 2023) laskumist just enne 2km punkti. Tartu Maraton kulgeb Otepäält Elvasse ja see sõidetakse klassikalises stiilis ning ta kuulub Worldloppeti ja Estoloppeti sarja. Proovige leida ennast suusatajate hulgast. Videos näidatav Tartu Maratoni 2 punkt on üks järsematest laskumistest ja seal juhtub tavaliselt palju kukkumisi. Sellel aastal tegi värske lumi raja aeglaseks ja pehmeks ja õnneks seal midagi hullu suusatajatega ei juhtunud. Tartu Maratoni võitjad olid Henri Roos and Justyna Kowalczyk. Andrus Veerpalu sai 4. koha.

videos.curation_reason: Recent 2023 race coverage of the challenging 2km downhill section with detailed course conditions and snow quality information.

videos.title: HIGHLIGHTS | 45. Tartu Maraton
videos.description:
Klassikalisel Otepää-Elva vahelisel trassil peetud põhisõitudele startis 3376 suusatajat – 2601 pikemale 63 km distantsile ning 775 lühemale 31 km sõidule. 
/
In total of 3376 skiers started in Sunday’s main races – 2601 to the longer 63 km distance and 775 to the shorter 31 km race.

videos.title: 44. Tartu Maraton
videos.description:
26. veebruaril peetud Tartu Maratoni eliitgrupi 34-kilomeetrisel distantsil läksid nii meeste kui ka naiste seas võidud Prantsusmaale. Eestlaste parimatena saavutasid Tatjana Mannima naiste seas teise ning meeste konkurentsis Kein Einaste 11. koha. Kahe võistluspäeva peale kokku osales tänavuse Tartu Maratoni põhipäevadel 2875 suusasõpra.
Loe lähemalt: https://www.tartumaraton.ee/et/uudised/2017/02/26/
//
Tartu Maraton's elite group's race winnings in the distance of 34 kilometers went both to France. Estonia's best were Tatjana Mannima, who gained second place among women, and Kein Einaste, who finished in 11th place among men. The total number of this year's Tartu Maraton's main events' participants is 2875.
Read more here: https://www.tartumaraton.ee/en/news/2017/02/26/ 

Video: Rockstick Production

videos.title: 36th Tartu Forest Marathon - trailer
videos.description: Tartu Running Marathon (or Tartu Jooksumaraton), the biggest cross-country running event in the Baltics, got itself a new name and is now called Tartu Forest Marathon. Also, a 42 km distance has been added to the programme. Every year about 4000 runners participate in the event. ➡️ https://www.tartumaraton.ee/en/events/jooksumaraton/36/

videos.title: 43. Tartu Maraton
SkiPlanet by Worldloppet 5 TARTU MARATON
videos.description:
💥ON AIR💥
Welcome to the 5th episode of #SkiPlanetByWorldloppet, your worldwide cross-country marathon skiing show!
Today, we’re in Tartu, in Estonia, to discover the great Tartu Maratoni Kuubik... and many more (Hellenurme Veskimuuseum MTÜ, Eesti Rahva Muuseum / Estonian National Museum, Demino Marathons, Engadin Skimarathon...)!
Enjoy the show !

👍 Don't miss this episode AND like the #Worldloppet page for not missing a single episode of #SkiPlanet !

• SKI PLANET is hosted by Marika Godin, produced by Worldloppet and proudly presented by Montagnes du Jura and Rossignol & Rossignol Apparel.

videos.curation_reason: Professional Worldloppet race coverage featuring the race experience and cultural context of Tartu Maraton.

videos.title: Indrek Kelk (Race Director Tartu Maraton) about the Tartu Maraton during the pandemic year.
videos.description: Tartu Maraton was one of the few events that were able to be carried out during the winter 2021. The pandemic didn't allow many big events. Tartu Maraton took place with 3500 skiers but under certain conditions.

videos.title: 50. Tartu Maraton - Tartu Ski Marathon - 2km point - 2024
videos.description:
ENGLISH: This video was filmed at the 2 km point of the 50th Tartu Ski Marathon. This location is one of the trickiest as it is very fast, resulting in many falls. This year the track was rather icy and therefore very fast. The winners of the marathon were: Henri Roos, Marko Kilp, Lauri Lepistö, Taavi Kõiv, Andrus Veerpaly, Andres Juursalu

ESTONIAN: See video on filmitud 50. Tartu Maratoni 2. kilomeetril. Seal asuv laskumine on üks maratoni kiiremaid ja seal juhtub palju kukkumisi. Seal aasal oli rada jäine ja väga kiire. Tartu Maratoni võitjad olid: Henri Roos, Marko Kilp, Lauri Lepistö, Taavi Kõiv, Andrus Veerpaly, Andres Juursalu

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

videos.title: 46th Tartu Maraton - trailer
videos.description:
Tartu Maraton is also known as the Estonian Song Festival of Winter because of its grand proportions and international fame. It brings together thousands of skiing enthusiasts every year from all corners of the world.

Lear more here ➡️ http://bit.ly/TM2019_eng
